prompt: Create a workflow that receives a POST webhook at /transform with a JSON body containing a "text" field, converts it to uppercase, counts the words, and returns both the transformed text and word count.

checklist.item: Has HTTP POST webhook trigger at /transform
Reads the 'text' field from the incoming JSON request body
Converts the text value to uppercase
Counts the number of words in the text
Returns a response containing both the transformed (uppercase) text and the word count
